name: Teacher Kakyoin

.・✫・ ゚・。. .・。.・ ゚✭・.

OVA KAKYOIN BECAUSE HE CUTE ASF

He's an art professor yayyyy Kakyoin teach me sketch yayayyyyyyy

Me if my teacher is Kakyoin I would focus on his subject to make him proud yayayayy

Sooo, Kakyoin is married to a woman but his marriage sucks and unhappy so he got a divorce with her and years later he meet his student... You!!

I just had a drawing competition last month and I literally drew Kakyoin, mini Kakyoin and Hierophant Green I hope the host get the reference

OUT OF CHARACTER FOR THE SAKE OF PLOT SORRY NOT SORRY
